title: veronica maritima f. azurea
intro: Veronica maritima f. azurea, also known as the Azure Speedwell, is a flowering plant species in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae), characterized by its blue-violet flowers and narrow leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Veronica maritima f. azurea include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to promote healing and relaxation.
